cite: FES2022 © CNES/LEGOS/NOVELTIS/CLS Ocean and Climate Division, distributed by AVISO with support from CNES. DOI:10.24400/527896/A01-2024.004
purpose: Experimental cross-evaluation of DEM bathymetry and the FES2022 tide model. NOT an official tide prediction.
disclaimer: Travail experimental — ne remplace pas les predictions officielles du SHOM. Modele global FES2022 : ~5 cm en mer ouverte, degrade en estuaire/ria. Pour la navigation, consulter le SHOM.
accuracy_note: Validated vs SHOM: ~6 cm RMS open coast (Concarneau), ~13-18 cm in deep estuaries (Brest) — FES grid resolution limit, affects the reference engine too.
quality_method: Per-port RMS vs SHOM grande-vignette (today). HIGH<=6, MED<=10, LOW>10 cm. Ports without a SHOM widget: UNKNOWN (no ground truth).
